name: Silent Exception Swallowing
description: Try/catch with an empty catch block. Exceptions are silently swallowed — caller cannot distinguish success from failure.
smt2Template:
(declare-const exception_thrown Int)
(declare-const exception_logged Int)
(declare-const exception_rethrown Int)
(declare-const caller_notified Int)
(assert (= exception_thrown 1))
(assert (= exception_logged 0))
(assert (= exception_rethrown 0))
(assert (= caller_notified 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: JSON parse in try/catch with empty catch — corrupt records vanish silently
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const parse_throws Int)
(declare-const error_logged Int)
(assert (= parse_throws 1))
(assert (= error_logged 0))
(check-sat)
